channel.title: Naija Digest Online
channel.description: Nigeria’s one-stop hub for breaking news, tech, football, celebrity gossip, Naija music, live TV, exchange rates and trending topics.

item.title: Jubilation in Ogbomoso as abducted schoolchildren, teachers rescued unharmed
item.dc:creator: Punch
item.description:
Jubilation in Ogbomoso as over 40 abducted schoolchildren and teachers are rescued unharmed. Read more about the successful rescue operation.
Read More: https://punchng.com/jubilation-in-ogbomoso-as-abducted-schoolchildren-teachers-rescued-unharmed/

item.description:

item.title: Oyo abduction: No ransom paid, no concession made – Tinubu
item.dc:creator: Punch
item.description:
President Tinubu confirms no ransom was paid for the release of Oyo abducted pupils and teachers, praising security forces for their successful operation.
Read More: https://punchng.com/oyo-abduction-no-ransom-paid-no-concession-made-tinubu/

item.title: Replicate Oyo rescue strategy across Nigeria, YPP tells Tinubu

item.dc:creator: Sky Sports Football
item.description: Declan Rice, Marc Guehi and Reece James gave England a triple injury boost ahead of their World Cup quarter-final with Norway.

item.description: Schneider, who formerly served as the CEO of Automattic and is a partner at True Ventures, says he is "all in" on the unconventional social media platform.

item.title: World Cup 2026: Merino Strikes Late Again As Spain Edge Out Belgium, Set Up Semifinal Clash With France
item.dc:creator: Completesports
item.description: Arsenal star Mikel Merino was the match winner once again as his late strike for Spain helped them to a 2-1 win against Belgium in the FIFA World Cup 2026 quarterfinal on Friday. With two minutes left in the game Merino, who was the match winner in the round of 16 against Portugal, pounced on [...]

item.title: Nuclear Energy Services Firm Holtec Joins Sector’s IPO Rush
item.dc:creator: Bloomberg Markets
item.description: Holtec Nuclear Corp. filed for a US initial public offering, becoming the latest in the sector to try to capitalize on data centers’ growing power demands.

item.title: Rhode Island Jail Operator Files Bankruptcy to Cut Bond Debt
item.dc:creator: Bloomberg Markets
item.description: Central Falls Detention Facility Corp., which houses federal detainees including people arrested by the US Immigration and Customs Enforcement agency, filed for bankruptcy saying it cannot afford to keep paying on more than $167 million in bond debt.

item.dc:creator: Daily Trust
item.description: Nigerian security forces have secured release of the pupils and teachers who were abducted by Ansaru terrorists in Oyo State, on May 15, 2026. item.title: New dinosaur species with neck as long as cricket pitch discovered in Thailand
item.dc:creator: BBC News World
item.description: The plant-eating dinosaur, named Uragasaurus kalasinensis, is thought to have lived about 150 million years ago.

item.title: World Cup: Merino winner sends Spain to semi-final
item.dc:creator: Daily Trust
item.description: Spain scored a late winner to defeat Belgium 2-1 and progress into the semi-final of the 2026 FIFA World Cup on Friday. Mikel Merino was the difference maker for Spain netting the winner two minutes before the end of 90 minutes after Fabian Ruiz’s opener was cancelled by Charles De Ketelaere. Spain

item.dc:creator: MarketWatch
item.description: “I’m actually earning more each week than I ever have before.”

item.dc:creator: Information Nigeria
item.description: Nollywood actress Eniola Badmus is celebrating herself on her weight loss journey. ‎In a lengthy post on her Instagram page, she disclosed that five years ago she weighed 170kg and today weighs 83kg. She said it didn’t happen overnight and took years of discipline, sacrifice, pain, consistency, tear

Donatus Ogun, O.S.A., as the Apostolic Administrator of the Catholic Archdiocese of Benin City, pending the appointment of a substantive Archbishop. The appointment followed the recent death of the Metropolitan Archbis

This means

item.dc:creator: Tribune
item.description: Operatives of the Kwara State Police Command have arrested two suspects for their alleged roles in facilitating the kidnapping of... The post Police arrest two suspected kidnappers in Kwara appeared first on Tribune Online.

item.title: Idoma Centenary Plus Unveils Talent Hunt With Auditions, Grand Prizes
item.dc:creator: Leadership
item.description: As part of the ongoing Idoma Centenary Plus Celebration, marking over a century since the establishment of the Idoma Division, organisers have launched the Idoma Talent Hunt (ITH). This flagship youth empowerment initiative aims to discover, nurture, and promote exceptional talents from across Idoma

item.title: Tinubu Vows Justice For Rescued Oriire Victims, Slain Teacher
item.dc:creator: TVC News
item.description: President Bola Tinubu has pledged that justice will be served for the pupils and teachers rescued from captivity in Oriire Local Government Area of Oyo State, as well as for the family of the late mathematics teacher, Michael Oyedokun, who was beheaded by the abductors. The President made the pledge

item.title: Makinde’s leadership aided Oyo schoolchildren rescue mission — APM
item.dc:creator: The Sun
item.description: The Allied People’s Movement (APM) has commended Oyo State Governor Seyi Makinde, the military, police and other security agencies for their roles in the successful rescue of schoolchildren and teachers abducted in Oriire Local Government Area of the state. The post Makinde’s leadership aided

item.title: NSC Secures Free-to-Air Broadcast Deal For Glasgow 2026 Commonwealth Games
item.dc:creator: Leadership
item.description: The National Sports Commission (NSC) has partnered with What Network to secure the free-to-air broadcast rights for the 2026 Commonwealth Games, ensuring millions of Nigerians can watch Team Nigeria’s campaign in Glasgow, Scotland, at no cost. Announcing the partnership at a press conference in Abuj

item.title: Oyo rescue operation: Tinubu commends Gov Makinde, security operatives
item.dc:creator: Tribune
item.description: Following the successful rescue of students and teachers abducted from schools in the Oriire community of Ogbomoso, Oyo State, President Bola The post Oyo rescue operation: Tinubu commends Gov Makinde, security operatives appeared first on Tribune Online.

item.title: Brentford Reward Fredrick With New Contract, First-Team Promotion
item.dc:creator: Completesports
item.description: Super Eagles defender Benjamin Fredrick has been promoted to Brentford’s first-team squad ahead of the 2026/27 Premier League season. The 21-year-old has also committed his future to the Bees by signing a new four-year contract, with the club holding the option to extend the deal by a further

item.title: The Grueling Economics of Tennis
item.dc:creator: Bloomberg Markets
item.description: Some of the world’s top tennis players will face off at the Wimbledon finals this weekend. The players who make it to Centre Court have already achieved a bigger feat: a career as a tennis player. On today’s Big Take podcast, Bloomberg’s Hannah Miller and The Athletic’s Matt Futterman break down wha

item.title: Oyo abduction: Presidency says eight kidnappers nabbed, others killed
item.dc:creator: The Sun
item.description: The presidency has shed more light on the circumstances surrounding the daring rescue of the abducted Oyo schoolchildren and teachers, saying eight of their abductors were captured while others were killed by security forces The post Oyo abduction: Presidency says eight kidnappers nabbed, others kil

item.title: Gov Lawal Distributes 72,000 Free Bags of Fertiliser, Chemicals, Equipment to Zamfara Farmers
item.dc:creator: Daily Trust
item.description: Zamfara State Governor, Dauda Lawal, has distributed more than 120 trucks of fertilisers and essential farm inputs to Zamfara farmers. The Zamfara 2026 wet-season fertiliser programme was launched on Friday at the Trade Fair Complex in Gusau, the state capital. According to a statement by the govern

item.title: Tinubu Upgrades Federal Polytechnic Nasarawa to Specialised Federal University
item.dc:creator: TVC News
item.description: President Bola Tinubu has approved the upgrade of the Federal Polytechnic, Nasarawa, into the Federal University of Mining, Engineering and Technology, Nasarawa, as part of efforts to strengthen technical education and develop the country’s solid minerals sector. The approval was announ

item.title: Makinde hails rescue of abducted Oyo pupils, teachers after 56 days
item.dc:creator: PM News
item.description: The governor also commended the military, police, intelligence services and other security personnel involved in the rescue operation, acknowledging the sacrifices made during the mission.

item.title: Seeing Signs of AI Fatigue: CreditSights Global Head of Strategy
item.dc:creator: Bloomberg Markets
item.description: CreditSights Global Head of Strategy Winnie Cisar discusses the tech sector and what to expect from AI. She speaks with Romaine Bostick and Katie Greifeld on “The Close.” (Source: Bloomberg)

item.title: Ajadi congratulates Gov. Makinde, families as abducted Oyo schoolchildren, teachers regain freedom
item.dc:creator: PM News
item.description: The Allied Peoples Movement (APM) senatorial candidate for Oyo Central Senatorial District, Ambassador Olufemi Ajadi Oguntoyinbo, has congratulated Governor Seyi Makinde, the families of the victims, and the people of Oyo State following the release of schoolchildren and teachers abducted at Ahoro-E

item.title: GPT-5.6, Grok 4.5, Claude, and Muse Spark build the same 4 apps

item.title: World Cup 2026: Ten Hag Distances Self From Replacing Koeman As Netherlands Coach
item.dc:creator: Completesports
item.description: Former Manchester United manager Erik ten Hag has officially ruled himself out of the running to replace Ronald Koeman as the Netherlands head coach. Ten Hag cited his complete commitment to his current two-year project as the technical director at FC Twente. Read Also:World Cup 2026: ‘When It’s Mba

item.title: Prince Harry, Family Meet King Charles After Four Years
item.dc:creator: Channels TV
item.description: Harry and Meghan have lived in California since 2020 and the children had not seen their grandfather since 2022. The post Prince Harry, Family Meet King Charles After Four Years appeared first on Channels Television.
